business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors.

coverages_discussed.notes: Supplemental application lists policy number WC GLFS 2025 8820. No coverage limits or requested limits are shown in the document.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history lists 2024 Hanover Insurance Group with 10 claims, 2023 Hartford Financial Services with 13 claims, and 2022 Auto-Owners Insurance with 12 claims. Cancellations are marked No for each listed year. Premium amounts are shown but are not legible enough to extract reliably.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 6:00 AM - 4:30 PM. Primary commodities hauled: Dry van: general freight, packaged goods. Flatbed: steel, lumber, machinery. ICC operating authority: Interstate (FMCSA) only.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. DOT violations or out-of-service orders in the past 3 years: No. Drivers are reported compliant with FMCSA Hours-of-Service regulations. GPS tracking or ELD devices are installed in all vehicles. MVR checks are performed on all drivers at least annually. Applicant maintains a valid DOT number and MC authority. CDL licenses are verified for all drivers at initial hire. Most recent CSA BASIC Crash Indicator score is above intervention threshold and currently being addressed.

fleet_summary.radius_of_operation: Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors; interstate (FMCSA) only

concerns: Most recent CSA BASIC Crash Indicator score is above intervention threshold and is being addressed.
Interstate trucking operation with dry van, flatbed, sleeper-cab, reefer/perishable cargo, and hired/non-owned auto exposures.
